title: Erysimum carduchorum
taxonomy: Erysimum carduchorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Erysimum and is part of the larger Brassicales order. As a member of the Brassicaceae family, Erysimum carduchorum shares characteristics with other plants such as mustard, cabbage, and broccoli. The species is native to the Carduchian region, hence its name. Erysimum carduchorum is a relatively rare plant that is often found in specific, limited habitats.
